title: Get to Know Microsoft Edge
body: intro Microsoft Edge What starts here, gets done here Download Edge Edge Edge Copilot Copilot Performance Performance Online safety Online safety Meet Copilot Copilot uses the context of your open tabs to compare options, explain what matters, and complete tasks with help that gets more personal over time. Try Copilot Built to start and stay fast Stay focused and in control with Microsoft Edge, the only browser optimized for superior performance on Windows. Learn more Stay safer online Browse with confidence on Microsoft Edge, designed with built-in security features and advanced controls to help protect your data from online threats. Learn more copilot-group copilot-ai-companion Copilot works across your tabs to compare options, explain what matters, and help complete tasks by using your browsing history to give you smarter, more personal help over time. Try Copilot copilot-vision A new way to browse with Copilot Vision With Copilot Vision, Copilot can see your screen and instantly scan, analyze, and offer suggestions based on your screen. Try Vision ai-innovations Explore even more AI innovations in Microsoft Edge Scareware blocker Edge is here to protect you from scareware attacks. Learn more Image generation Turn words into visuals instantly—no design skills required. Learn more Organize tabs One-click tab cleanup, powered by AI. Learn more AI Theme Generator Transform your words into browser themes. Learn more tablestakes Built on the browser that puts you first performance Achieve more performance Stay focused with Microsoft Edge, built with Copilot, browser actions, tab organization, and advanced performance features to help you do more with every minute you spend online. Energy saver Startup boost Sleeping tabs Get an average of 25 more minutes of battery life with efficiency mode. Only on Microsoft Edge. Battery life varies based on settings, usage, and other factors. Learn more online-safety Stay safer online When it comes to online safety, Microsoft Edge has your back. Equipped with built-in enhanced security features and advanced security controls, Edge makes it easier to defend yourself against online threats. Edge Secure Network Password management Microsoft Defender SmartScreen Microsoft Edge helps you stay protected while you browse by blocking phishing and malware attacks. Learn more gaming Use the in-game browser built for gaming Access guides, gaming tips, your favorite sites and more without leaving your game with Microsoft Edge for Game Bar, the first in-game browser built specifically for PC gaming. Learn more do-more-with-edge Do more with Edge What's new in Edge Edge introduces new features every month. Check out the latest features here. See new features Take Edge on the go Edge with Copilot built in helps you browse, search, and stay productive on any device. Get the Edge app better-together-gallery-desktop Unlock more in your browsing experience Bing Edge is designed to enhance your Bing search experience, providing faster, smarter, and more tailored results. Experience seamless integration between Bing and Edge. Learn more Rewards As a Microsoft Rewards member, it’s easy to get rewarded for doing what you already do. Earn Rewards points fast when you search with Bing in Edge. Then, redeem your points for gift cards, donations, and more. Start earning Microsoft 365 Enjoy access to free Microsoft 365 web apps like Word, Excel, and PowerPoint–side-by-side with your Microsoft Edge web content–in just a click. Internet access required, fees may apply. Learn more devices Browse with Edge across all your devices Easily sync your passwords, favorites, and settings across all your devices—Windows, macOS, iOS, or Android. Download for your device * Feature availability and functionality may vary by device type, market, and browser version. * The content on this page may have been translated using AI.
